candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue/sales label; preferred candidate matches exactly.

variables.notes: Selected the exact revenue line rather than the identical total/subtotal row 'TOTAL OPERATING INCOME'.

candidates.why: Best match for direct cost of sales/production inputs.

variables.notes: Chosen as the closest direct cost-of-sales line. Excluded broader operating expense rows.

candidates.why: Overhead-type operating cost bucket; fits SG&A components and is not a total.
Classic SG&A overhead component and not a total/subtotal.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected overhead component rows and excluded COGS, depreciation, amortization, impairment, and total operating expense rows.
No research and development expense line is identifiable in the provided Income Statement.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; useful fallback if no explicit interest line is populated in some years.
Explicit interest expense label; preferred over broader financial expenses.
Explicit interest-related line, though narrower than total interest expense.
Finance-cost line but not specifically interest; weaker fallback.
Most semantically correct generic interest expense label, even though preview is blank.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Explicit interest-related supplemental disclosure, but narrow and supplemental.

variables.notes: Priority list for a changing single reported interest line: generic interest expense first, explicit bank-loan interest second, broader financial expenses as fallback when only aggregate finance cost is available. Excluded leasing-only and other-financial-expense lines from final priority because they are partial/narrower components.

candidates.row_label: EQUITY ATTRIBUABLE TO SHAREHOLDERS OF THE PARENT COMPANY
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests, avoiding double count with MIB.
Contains total equity including NCI, so only a fallback if owner equity were unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not an equity measure.

final_choice.row_label: EQUITY ATTRIBUABLE TO SHAREHOLDERS OF THE PARENT COMPANY

variables.notes: Used parent-company equity to exclude non-controlling interests, consistent with BE+MIB construction.

Income statement attribution amount, not the preferred balance-sheet MIB stock.
Income statement attribution text, not balance-sheet minority interest.
Direct balance-sheet NCI line; best MIB match.
Equivalent balance-sheet label; good fallback across years.
